earnRateNote: Points earned per $1 spent at The Quarry (closed tab).

tiers.name: Quarry Gold
tiers.perks: 1.25× earn rate. Early access to event RSVPs. Priority on busy nights.

tiers.name: Quarry Platinum
tiers.perks: 1.5× earn rate. Hosted tastings invitation. Concierge holiday booking.

catalog.name: $5 Off Your Bill
catalog.description: Applied to any check at the bar.

catalog.name: $20 Wine Bottle Credit
catalog.description: Toward any bottle on the list.

catalog.name: Birthday Entrée
catalog.description: On us during your birthday month.

catalog.name: Private Event Priority
catalog.description: First access to open event dates.

bonuses.name: Public Event RSVP
bonuses.description: Earn bonus points for RSVPing public events on the app.

bonuses.name: Refer a Friend
bonuses.description: When a referred friend's first visit closes a tab.

bonuses.name: Birthday Month Bonus
bonuses.description: Free dessert during your birthday month.
